content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates strong methodology fidelity by deploying AoA-aligned moves at the right moments. Turn 6 ('What would it mean about you, if you wanted less?') is a signature identity/fear-underneath question used appropriately when the client is hedging with guilt. Turn 10 catches the linguistic-caveat / move-to-the-words deflection — a precise AoA read — and redirects to feel-over-figure rather than supplying the script the client requested (avoiding the boundary-script trap). Turn 12's 'What's it like to notice that?' is a clean noticing move. Turn 14 ('Can you stay with the wanting... what do you actually want?') is essentially the state-the-want-not-the-action move and gestures toward the-want concept. The coach refuses CBT reframing, refuses scripts, and stays with fear/want. The only thing keeping this from being a textbook 3 with all expected territory hit is that the love test ('does saying it increase your love?') was never deployed, but what is present is appropriate and well-timed.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple feel-toward question rather than problem-solving; appropriate opener."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the guilt — feel-over-figure orientation."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What would it mean about you' — signature identity/fear-underneath question, well-timed."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reflects the two fears; the 'what if it didn't mean either' has a faint reframe flavor but is offered as a question, not prescription."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic-caveat / move-to-words deflection — precise AoA read, redirects from script to feeling."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What's it like to notice that' — clean noticing/awareness move."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "State-the-want-not-the-action move; invokes the-want concept by asking to stay with wanting before the 'but'."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "the-want"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["does-saying-it-increase-your-love", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "empowered-vs-power", "view (not explicitly invoked)"],
  "notes": "No anti-AoA frames deployed; coach actively avoided the script-giving trap when client explicitly requested it (turn 9). Love test absent but the work done is appropriate AoA work."
}
